title: Chakra: Bound
description: Chakra: Bound is an alpha-stage Naruto & Boruto–inspired Minecraft mod focused on canon-accurate chakra combat and shinobi progression. All clans, jutsu, and per-eye dōjutsu are built directly into the mod and expanded through updates.
body:
Chakra: Bound

Chakra: Bound is an alpha-stage Naruto & Boruto–inspired Minecraft mod centered on deep shinobi progression, canon accuracy, and chakra-driven combat.

Chakra shapes every ninja’s path. Players will experience the world of Naruto and Boruto through fully integrated systems for clans, dōjutsu, and jutsu—all developed directly within the mod itself. There are no external addons or custom clan systems; all content is official, curated, and expanded through mod updates to ensure consistency, balance, and long-term stability.

Dōjutsu are handled per eye, allowing for accurate variants, asymmetrical builds, and faithful mechanics that reflect the source material rather than simplified shortcuts.

⚠️ Alpha Disclaimer
This mod is currently in active alpha development. Content is incomplete and subject to change. Expect ongoing additions, balance adjustments, and system refinements as development progresses.

✨ Planned Features
All canon clans from Naruto & Boruto
All canon dōjutsu and variants
Each dōjutsu is individual per eye
All canon jutsu across Naruto & Boruto material
Chakra-based progression and combat systems
RPG-style growth designed for long-term survival worlds
Multiplayer- and server-friendly core design

Chakra: Bound is built as a single, unified experience, prioritizing depth, authenticity, and progression over modular addons.

Bind your chakra.
Walk your shinobi path. 🥷
